events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: missing weld per drawing. Structural welding, AWS D1.1. Missing weld is non-compliant, installed-defective. Work rough-complete. Decision fail. Risk high? Missing structural weld can be high/critical. Need choose. For structural weld missing per drawing, risk high maybe critical depending on load path. But no specifics. Use high. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 85. value 0. confidence 1.0. findings: missing weld per drawing. actions: add weld per WPS/drawing, inspect. rationale. references AWS D1.1. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no markdown.
